mapper.sql: select f.formula_id, f.scene_id, s.scene_code, s.scene_name, s.business_domain, f.formula_code, f.formula_name, f.formula_desc, f.business_formula, f.formula_expr, f.namespace_scope, f.return_type, f.test_case_json, f.sample_result_json, f.last_test_time, f.status, f.sort_no, f.remark, f.create_by, f.create_time, f.update_by, f.update_time, (select count(1) from cost_variable v where v.scene_id = f.scene_id and v.formula_code = f.formula_code) as variable_ref_count, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.scene_id = f.scene_id and r.amount_formula_code = f.formula_code) as rule_ref_count, (select count(1) from cost_publish_snapshot snap join cost_publish_version ver on ver.version_id = snap.version_id where ver.scene_id = f.scene_id and snap.snapshot_type = 'FORMULA' and snap.object_code = f.formula_code) as published_version_count from cost_formula f left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = f.scene_id
mapper.select: order by s.scene_name asc, f.sort_no asc, f.formula_id desc
order by s.scene_name asc, f.sort_no asc, f.formula_id desc

select count(1) as formulaCount, coalesce(sum(case when f.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as enabledFormulaCount, coalesce(sum((select count(1) from cost_variable v where v.scene_id = f.scene_id and v.formula_code = f.formula_code)), 0) as variableRefCount, coalesce(sum((select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.scene_id = f.scene_id and r.amount_formula_code = f.formula_code)), 0) as ruleRefCount from cost_formula f left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = f.scene_id

select f.formula_id as formulaId, f.scene_id as sceneId, f.formula_code as formulaCode, f.formula_name as formulaName, (select count(1) from cost_variable v where v.scene_id = f.scene_id and v.formula_code = f.formula_code) as variableRefCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.scene_id = f.scene_id and r.amount_formula_code = f.formula_code) as ruleRefCount, (select count(1) from cost_publish_snapshot snap join cost_publish_version ver on ver.version_id = snap.version_id where ver.scene_id = f.scene_id and snap.snapshot_type = 'FORMULA' and snap.object_code = f.formula_code) as publishedVersionCount from cost_formula f where f.formula_id = #{formulaId}
